'''Storthus''' was a desolate [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Churba sector/Legends|Churba sector]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the giant [[stone eel]]s, an indigenous [[Species/Legends|species]] composed of living rock.

{{Planet-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The PC [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] mistakenly places the Churba Sector and, consequently, Storthus, in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].
